projects.title: boogu-project / Boogu-Image
projects.description: Boogu-Image-0.1 is an Apache-2.0 open-source image generation and editing model family that delivers near-closed-source performance with an order of magnitude less data.
projects.chinese_summary: 【数据分析】解决特定场景需求
projects.detailed_description: 这是一个数据处理工具。帮你分析、处理和可视化数据，将复杂的原始数据转化为易懂的图表和结论，适合数据分析需求。
projects.metaphor: 💡 它就像「数据翻译官」——把晦涩难懂的原始数据，翻译成一目了然的图表和结论，让数据会说话。
projects.usage: 适合需要处理数据、做数据分析的人，比如运营、产品经理

projects.title: darialebedev8 / Crypto-Clipper
projects.description: Cross-platform cryptocurrency clipboard utility with multi-chain address detection and validation for BTC, ETH, SOL, TRX, LTC, and DOGE. Supports regex-based matching, EIP-55, Base58, SegWit, and Taproot formats, activity logging, custom rules, clipboard history, and Windows, Linux, and macOS compatibility for wallet address management.

projects.title: kelleylenc / Seed-Generator
projects.description: Professional BIP-39 seed phrase generator and HD wallet toolkit with 12–24-word mnemonics, checksum validation, and BIP-44/49/84 derivation. Supports BTC, ETH, SOL, LTC, DOGE, ADA, DOT, AVAX, ATOM, XRP, TRX, and Testnet. Offline CSPRNG generation, PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA512, AES-256-GCM encryption, wallet recovery, batch export, and custom paths.
projects.chinese_summary: 【命令行工具】提供实用工具，主要涉及 brute-force-tool, mnemonic-code-converter, mnemonic-generator-solana 等技术
projects.detailed_description: 这是一个命令行工具。通过终端命令就能快速使用，适合程序员和开发者提高工作效率，通常体积小巧但功能强大。

projects.usage: 适合想用 AI 提升效率的开发者，或者想快速搭建智能应用的创业者

projects.title: inni918 / warashi
projects.description: Warashi — a free, open-source desktop AI companion with a Live2D avatar, voice chat, long-term memory, and proactive conversation.
projects.chinese_summary: 【AI/机器学习】解决特定场景需求
